title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 11 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 11 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 11 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.04 % today, the main contract closed at 827.5. The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 913 yuan/mt.
